data.title: Philippines waste recycling company One and One Green Technologies announces IPO on Nasdaq, offering 2 million shares at $5 each, raising $10 million.
data.description: San Rafael, Bulacan, Philippines, Oct. 09, 2025 - One and one Green Technologies. INC (NASDAQ: YDDL), a Philippine company specializing in waste materials and scrap metal recycling, has disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering. The offering consists of 2,000,000 class A ordinary shares valued at $5.00 per share, totaling $10,000,000 in gross proceeds. This amount is before accounting for underwriting discounts and associated expenses. Additionally, the Company has provided underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to 300,000 extra Class A Ordinary Shares to cover over-allotments, as necessary. All shares offered are from the Company.
Fed bids for 4-week bills total $298.9 mln.

data.title: SHIB ending 2025 consolidation, likely to outperform DOGE, technical indicators show. SHIB price near 0.00001350 resistance.
data.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB) is on the brink of a significant breakout after being in a consolidation phase for almost a year. Technical indicators indicate that the meme token might surpass Dogecoin (DOGE) as the market cycle progresses. The price of SHIB is currently within a bullish symmetrical triangle formation, with resistance at 0.00001350 and a rising support level around 0.00001200. The 200-day Exponential Moving Average (EMA) further reinforces this setup, hinting at an imminent increase in volatility after a prolonged period of sideways trading. If SHIB manages to break above the 0.00001350 resistance level, it could result in a substantial price surge. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: REPKON USA partners with Dyno Nobel to form Nitradyn LLC for chemical production; Dyno Nobel has global reach with thousands of employees.
data.description: REPKON USA-Chemical Technologies, LLC, a key player in designing and developing chemical manufacturing facilities, has partnered with Dyno Nobel, Inc., a subsidiary of Dyno Nobel Limited. Dyno Nobel is a global leader in explosives and energetics products, boasting a vast workforce globally. The joint venture, Nitradyn, LLC, has been established as a result of this collaboration. The partnership is set to combine the expertise of REPKON USA with the extensive resources of Dyno Nobel, promising a strong impact in the industry.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates UNP, MTSR, SCS for shareholder rights violations. News released on Oct. 9, 2025.
data.description: Today in New York on October 9, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, disclosed an ongoing investigation into various companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and/or fiduciary duties. The companies under scrutiny include Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP)...

data.title: Clean Cans CFL, LLC in Orlando acquires Bin Gators in residential bin cleaning services partnership. #acquisition #Orlando #trash #recycling #powerwashing
data.description: Orlando, Florida - On October 9, 2025, Clean Cans CFL, LLC, a top provider of residential trash and recycling bin cleaning services and power washing in Central Florida, revealed their acquisition of Bin Gators, another company specializing in residential bin cleaning services. This strategic move consolidates Clean Cans' position as the premier service provider in the region.

data.title: CFC will host conference call on Q1 financial results on Oct 15 at 9am ET.
data.description: The National Rural Utilities Cooperative Finance Corporation has scheduled an investor conference call and webcast for Wednesday, October 15 at 9 a.m. Eastern Time. This event will provide key stakeholders with important updates and insights regarding the organization's financial performance and future plans. Participants are encouraged to join the conference call and webcast to stay informed about developments within the corporation.

data.title: Report on Network APIs Market: 2025-2030. Includes analysis on vendors like Microsoft, Nokia, and Vonage. Insights for informed business decisions.

This research suite focuses on providing analysis and insights on the expanding network API market for operators, CPaaS providers, and GSMA channel partners. It equips stakeholders with valuable data to support informed decision-making pertaining to product development and business strategies within the network API market. data.title: Mouser Electronics adds 16,000+ new parts in Q3 2025, partners with 1,200+ brands, focuses on genuine, traceable products.
data.description: In Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, Mouser Electronics, Inc., an authorized global distributor, prioritizes the swift launch of new products and technologies to provide customers with a competitive advantage and expedite time to market. With a portfolio of over 1,200 semiconductor and electronic component manufacturer brands, Mouser aids in introducing their products worldwide. Customers of Mouser can access 100% certified, authentic products that are entirely traceable back to the manufacturer, ensuring quality and reliability.

data.title: Jyske Bank raises 2025 EPS outlook to DKK 77-84 from previous DKK 60-73, with expected net profit of DKK 4.9-5.3bn.
data.description: Jyske Bank has revised its 2025 net profit forecast to be between DKK 4.9 billion and DKK 5.3 billion, with earnings per share ranging from DKK 77 to DKK 84. This update represents a significant increase from the previous projection of a net profit at the top end of DKK 3.8 billion to DKK 4.6 billion, and earnings per share at the upper limit of DKK 60 to DKK 73.

data.title: Algen Biotechnologies partners with AstraZeneca to advance AI drug discovery in immunology, backed by Lifespan Vision Ventures.
data.description: Norwalk, Connecticut, October 9, 2025 - Lifespan Vision Ventures is pleased to announce that its portfolio company, Algen Biotechnologies, has entered into a research collaboration with AstraZeneca aimed at enhancing AI-driven drug discovery in the field of immunology. The partnership will focus on developing multiple targets to further innovation in this area.

data.title: NCAA Division I campus leaders express concerns over sports direction, financial stability, and impact of House v. NCAA settlement.
data.description: Results from a recent survey of NCAA Division I university presidents and athletics officials have uncovered significant concerns about the current state of Division I sports. The survey, conducted nationally, revealed deep worries regarding the direction of Division I sports, financial stability, and the implications of the House v. NCAA settlement. The survey, released on Oct. 9, 2025, in Arlington, Virginia, highlighted issues such as the ongoing financial challenges faced by universities, the potential impact of the recent legal settlement on NCAA regulations, and the overall uncertainty surrounding the future of Division I athletics. The survey results underscore the need for continued discussions and strategic planning to address the critical issues facing NCAA Division I sports.

data.title: ZIPS Car Wash upgrades 3 locations in North Carolina, free car wash on Oct 14 in Greensboro.
data.description: ZIPS Car Wash in Greensboro, N.C. is embracing a refreshed look this year, highlighted by the refurbishment of two locations in Greensboro and one in Winston Salem. The grand reopening festivities will commence with a complimentary car wash on October 14th at the Greensboro ZIPS Car Wash sites situated at 2109 Pyramids Village Blvd. and 2300 Battleground Avenue. To mark the occasion, a Ribbon Cutting Ceremony will be organized at 11:30am in collaboration with the Greensboro Chamber of Commerce. Additionally, free Travelin’ Tom’s Coffee will be available from 10:30am to 12:30pm.

data.title: Analysts forecast $6.50 target for DOT by late October despite bearish momentum. Caution at $4.37 resistance.
data.description: Analysts have conflicting predictions for the future price of DOT, with projections ranging from $6.50 to $13.79. However, caution is advised as current technical indicators signal resistance around the $4.37 mark. This suggests a volatile market for DOT in the near future.

data.title: The US economy is K-shaped, with top earners thriving but lower-income households struggling. Wage growth highlights the disparity, with high-income households seeing a 4.0% rise, middle-income at 2.4%, and lower-income at 1.4%. Wall Street grows while Main Street lags behind.
data.description: Despite record-breaking performances on Wall Street, everyday Americans are facing economic stress, highlighting the K-shaped nature of the U.S. economy. Bank of America's chief investment strategist Michael Hartnett recently stated that Wall Street is now six times larger than Main Street. While equity wealth is soaring and top earners are experiencing wage growth, cracks are beginning to show in subprime credit markets and consumer finance stocks. Higher-income households are driving economic growth, with wage growth for top earners at 4.0% YoY, middle-income at 2.4%, and lower-income at just 1.4%. This income disparity is widening, reflecting a slowdown in the labor market, with payroll growth rising at only 0.5% YoY in September. This data suggests that parts of the economy may not be as robust as market averages indicate. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
